intended_use: QLAB Advanced Quantification Software is a software application package. It is designed to view and quantify image data acquired on Philips ultrasound systems.
intended_use_full: QLAB Advanced Quantification Software is a software application package. It is designed to view and quantify image data acquired on Philips ultrasound systems.
target_condition: Right ventricle quantification and functional assessment in patients with suspected cardiovascular disease
ground_truth: Predicate 4D RV device (for internal validation study); cardiac MR (CMR) for external published study
other_metrics: RV end diastolic volume error rates below 15% for all datasets tested; RMSE 8.3 ml for end diastolic volume, 2.7 ml for end systolic volume, 2.7% for ejection fraction compared to predicate 4D RV; external study showed <15% difference from CMR measurements in all cases
